scripts.test: node --input-type=module -e "import { runSmokeTest } from './src/tests/smokeTest.js'; runSmokeTest();" && node --input-type=module -e "import { runPersistenceTest } from './src/tests/persistenceTest.js'; runPersistenceTest();" && node --input-type=module -e "import { runUiLogicTest } from './src/tests/uiLogicTest.js'; runUiLogicTest();" && node --input-type=module -e "import { runGameSim } from './src/tests/gameSimTest.js'; runGameSim(25);"
scripts.deploy: git add -A && git commit -m 'deploy' && git push && vercel --prod
